reasons: Kaja can suppress and drag a priority target into Cyclops' spell range.
Cyclops can follow Kaja's isolation with magic damage and Star Power Lockdown.

proof.summary: Kaja isolates a target with suppression, and Cyclops follows with magic damage and lockdown to finish the pick.
worksBestWhen: Kaja catches a squishy or mobile target.
Cyclops is close enough to cast immediately.
failureCases: Cyclops is zoned away before follow-up.
The team lacks damage to finish during the lock window.

reasons: Franco can pull or suppress one target, giving Cyclops a clear follow-up target.
Cyclops can add immediate magic damage and lockdown after Franco creates the pick.

proof.summary: Franco pulls or suppresses one target, while Cyclops adds immediate magic damage and target lockdown.
worksBestWhen: Franco lands hook on a high-value target.
Cyclops holds cooldowns until the target is displaced.
failureCases: Cyclops uses ultimate too early or on a low-value target.

reasons: Tigreal's crowd control gives Cyclops a safer and more predictable window to cast into the fight.
Cyclops can follow Tigreal's engage with repeated spell damage and target lockdown.

proof.summary: Tigreal starts the fight and controls enemy movement, while Cyclops follows with repeated magic skills and target lockdown.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal controls enemies before Cyclops commits.
failureCases: Tigreal engages out of Cyclops' range.
Cyclops is dived before the fight starts.
The enemy disengages before Cyclops can stack damage.

reasons: Angela helps Cyclops survive when he steps forward to chase or continue spell rotations.
Cyclops can play more aggressively when Angela adds healing and shielding during his commit.

proof.summary: Cyclops often needs to stay near spell range, while Angela can heal, shield, and support him during chase or retreat.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves support for Cyclops' forward commit.
Cyclops is already ahead or has enough damage to chase.
failureCases: Cyclops is instantly bursted before support arrives.
Angela attaches to the wrong target.

reasons: Floryn can sustain Cyclops during skirmishes even when he rotates away from the support position.
Cyclops benefits from global healing when he chases or fights outside a tight grouped formation.

proof.summary: Cyclops benefits from extra sustain while chasing or skirmishing, and Floryn can provide global healing without needing to stand beside him.
worksBestWhen: Cyclops engages when Floryn's ultimate is available.
The team avoids forcing fights after the global heal is used.
failureCases: Cyclops is burst down before the heal timing.
Cyclops fights while Floryn's ultimate is unavailable.
